    Class Description
    glide.api.models.ClusterTransaction
    This class is deprecated and should no longer be used. Use ClusterBatch instead.
    glide.api.models.Transaction
    This class is deprecated and should no longer be used. Use Batch instead.

    glide.api.commands.TransactionsClusterCommands.exec​(ClusterTransaction)
    Use TransactionsClusterCommands.exec(ClusterBatch, boolean) instead. This method is being replaced by a more flexible approach using ClusterBatch.

    Executes a transaction by processing the queued commands.

    The transaction will be routed to the slot owner of the first key found in the transaction. If no key is found, the command will be sent to a random node.
    glide.api.commands.TransactionsCommands.exec​(Transaction)
    Use TransactionsCommands.exec(Batch, boolean) instead. This method is being replaced by a more flexible approach using Batch.

    Executes a transaction by processing the queued commands.
    glide.api.GlideClient.exec​(Transaction)
    glide.api.GlideClusterClient.exec​(ClusterTransaction)
    glide.api.models.commands.scan.ClusterScanCursor.initalCursor()
    Use ClusterScanCursor.initialCursor() instead.

    response.ResponseOuterClass.RequestErrorType.valueOf​(int)
    response.ResponseOuterClass.Response.ValueCase.valueOf​(int)
